rootMetadata.description: ER&GG provides Eternal Return character tiers, trio recommendations, and win rate, pick rate, and average RP statistics based on high-rank match data.
rootMetadata.author: ER&GG
rootMetadata.creator: ER&GG
rootMetadata.structuredDescription: Eternal Return character tiers, trio recommendations, and statistics analysis service

sectionErrorBoundary.temporaryIssue: This may be a temporary issue.

home.title: Meta Analysis
home.subtitle: Live analysis based on {count} matches
home.honeyPicksDescription: Characters climbing after buffs with rising pick and win rates
home.rankingDescription: Overall rankings based on meta score

tooltips.pickRate: Share of games where this character was picked.
tooltips.winRate: Rate of finishing 1st with this character. Expected baseline: 12.5%.
tooltips.averageRp: Average rank points gained per game. Positive values mean climbing.

honeyPicks.empty: No buffed breakout characters were found for this patch.

characterPage.title: Character Analysis
characterPage.subtitle: Deep dive into win rate, builds, patch trends, and equipment stats by character

characterAnalysis.synergyCta: Find team comps with this character

characterPatch.notEnoughData: Not enough patch data to compare.
characterPatch.minTwoPatches: At least two patches are required.

synergyPage.dataNotice: Collecting data · accuracy improves as the sample grows
synergyPage.title: Detailed Team Recommender
synergyPage.subtitle: Deep team analysis including weapons and main traits · click a comp to view trait breakdowns

empty.prompt: Find weapon-specific team comps based on your allies' picks
empty.step2: 2. Select your allies' characters and weapons
empty.step3: 3. Click a comp to inspect trait-level performance

synergyResults.infoSingle: Add one more ally for more accurate recommendations · click a comp to see the trait breakdown
synergyResults.infoPair: Click a comp to see the trait breakdown
synergyResults.emptyFiltered: No comps match your current character pool. Try widening the pool.
synergyResults.emptyNoData: No data is available for this team setup.
synergyResults.timeout: The request timed out. Please try again.

empty.detailed: No detailed analysis data is available.
empty.itemBuilds: No item build data is available for this trait setup.

empty.builds: No trait build data is available.

pageError.description: There may be a temporary server or connection issue. The problem has been reported automatically.
pageError.characterLoadFailed: Failed to load character analysis data
pageError.synergyLoadFailed: Failed to load team recommendation data
pageError.synergyDetailLoadFailed: Failed to load detailed team data

characterMetadata.descriptionWithName: Analyze {name}'s Eternal Return win rate, pick rate, average RP, and optimal builds. Review patch trends and weapon pairings for {name}.
characterMetadata.descriptionFallback: Analyze Eternal Return characters by win rate, pick rate, average RP, and optimal builds. Review patch trends and weapon pairings.
characterMetadata.socialDescription: Eternal Return character win rate, pick rate, average RP, and optimal build statistics.

synergyMetadata.descriptionPair: Analyze the optimal third pick for {name1} + {name2} with Bayesian team statistics.
synergyMetadata.descriptionSingle: Analyze the best second and third picks to pair with {name1} using Bayesian team statistics.
synergyMetadata.descriptionFallback: Explore Eternal Return trio recommendations and continue to the detailed analysis with weapons and traits.

synergyDetailMetadata.descriptionPair: Analyze the optimal third pick for {name1} + {name2} with Bayesian statistics, including weapons and traits.
synergyDetailMetadata.descriptionSingle: Analyze the best second and third picks to pair with {name1} using Bayesian team statistics.
synergyDetailMetadata.descriptionFallback: Explore detailed Eternal Return trio recommendations with weapons and main traits using Bayesian team analysis.
synergyDetailMetadata.title: {headline} - With Weapons and Traits | ERWAGG ER&GG
